## What this changes

Short summary.

## Why

Link an issue if applicable, or explain the motivation.

## Type of change

- [ ] Typo, broken link, or small fix
- [ ] New chapter or section
- [ ] New cookbook example
- [ ] New case study
- [ ] New diagram
- [ ] Update for a Salesforce release
- [ ] Other (describe)

## Checklist

- [ ] Tone matches the rest of the guide (plain prose, no marketing language).
- [ ] No em dashes (use commas, parentheses, or sentence breaks).
- [ ] Code samples are deployable as-is, with placeholders in `<ANGLE_BRACKETS>`.
- [ ] Cross-links to other chapters use relative paths.
- [ ] If a new diagram, it lives in `diagrams/` and uses the same fonts and palette.
- [ ] If a new case study, it is anonymised.

## Screenshots or rendered output

If your change includes a diagram or affects rendering, include a screenshot.
